agentUtterance.text:
Jamie uses a wide range of tools across her work:

**AI Tools**: Claude, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, v0 by Vercel
**Design**: Figma, Adobe Suite, Sketch with Zeplin, InVision, Balsamiq
**Research & Analytics**: Full Story, Hotjar, Userlytics
**Collaboration**: Miro, Notion
**Project Management**: Jira/Confluence, Asana
**Development**: VS Code with GitHub Copilot, MCP servers, Figma Make

She also has experience evaluating and implementing tool strategies for teams - she's helped organizations adopt design systems, establish MCP server workflows to bridge design and development, and build AI-assisted development environments.

playbookInput.precedingConversationSummary: User asked about the tools Jamie uses.

playbookOutput.executionSummary: Listed all tools Jamie uses organized by category.
